name: Gemini CLI
description: Google's open-source AI agent CLI that brings Gemini into your terminal with MCP client support, tool use, code execution, and multi-modal capabilities.

skills.name: Terminal Agent
skills.description: Run Gemini as a full AI agent in your terminal with tool use, file access, and command execution

skills.name: MCP Client
skills.description: Connect to any MCP server and use its tools directly within the Gemini CLI agent session

skills.name: Code Execution
skills.description: Execute code in sandboxed environments and iterate on results within the same CLI session
